text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: brooks

Log:
  Update to 11.0.0rc5.

  Add the AVR backend to the list of standard backends which should fix
  builds with BE_NATIVE or BE_FREEBSD.

  PR:		250029
  Reported by:	Mohammad S. Babaei
  MFH:		2020Q4
